/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/usr/local/opt/tcl-tk/lib CMakeFiles/OpenGLTest.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLTest.dir/glad/glad.c.o -o OpenGLTest  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
